claim: Explorer claim confirmed: YOLO demand evidence dispatch API/schema supports WebFetch/WebSearch as external evidence (scope=external) while requiring project-scoped path evidence for target-project facts.

evidence.summary: VALID_EVIDENCE_SCOPES explicitly includes 'external' alongside 'project', 'user', 'unknown' - confirms schema support for external evidence scope
evidence.why: Core schema validation must include 'external' as valid scope for WebFetch/WebSearch evidence

evidence.summary: evidenceScopeErrors() validates that every evidence record declares scope as project/external/user/unknown; missing scope blocks the result
evidence.why: Mandatory scope declaration prevents evidence records without explicit scope classification

evidence.summary: Agent prompt hard rule: 'If the demand explicitly asks for external research/fetch/search, actually use WebFetch/WebSearch when available and record those records as scope=external'
evidence.why: Explicit protocol requires agents to use external tools when available and mark results as external scope

evidence.summary: Agent prompt hard rule: 'Project facts require project-scoped evidence from code, tests, docs, config, logs, or artifacts, with a repo-relative path or file locator'
evidence.why: Explicit requirement separates project facts (need path) from external research (no path needed)

evidence.summary: executionConfig() normalizes agent_tool_profile; 'research' profile enables external tools for Claude provider (ai.claude_tools="", ai.settings="" unrestricts tools)
evidence.why: Configuration layer actually enables external research tools when agent_tool_profile='research'

evidence.summary: DEMAND_EVIDENCE_RESULT_SCHEMA_DEFINITION field definition: 'evidence: scope is project | external | user | unknown; project facts require project-scoped evidence'
evidence.why: Schema contract documents that project facts have stricter evidence requirements than external

evidence.summary: projectEvidenceBlockingIssues() blocks when evidence is only external/unknown but claim requires project facts; error: 'PROJECT_FACT_REQUIRES_PROJECT_EVIDENCE'
evidence.why: Validation gate prevents external-only evidence from proving target-project implementation facts

evidence.summary: evidenceRecordScope() infers scope from record fields; detects external URLs (path starting with http:// or https://) and source types (external_web, webfetch, websearch)
evidence.why: Scope inference logic automatically classifies web-fetched content as external scope

evidence.summary: Doctrine states: 'external evidence can only be background research, cannot prove target project has fields/API/state'
evidence.why: Product documentation confirms architectural intent: external evidence cannot establish project facts

risks: Agent provider may not actually expose WebFetch/WebSearch tools at runtime despite code-level support
Agents may misunderstand or misapply scope=external vs project scope in practice, especially when web results contain project-relevant information
missing: Runtime verification that WebFetch/WebSearch tools are actually available to evidence agents under Claude provider
Integration test with real external fetch to confirm scope=external is properly applied and does not leak into project facts validation
Stress test with dirty working tree to confirm boundary audit detects project mutations during external research

result.notes: All explorer evidence independently verified. Code implementation fully supports external evidence scope=external with proper blocking rules to prevent mixing with project facts. Missing items are runtime verification gaps, not code defects.
